overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking up a mountain trail. The character ascends from a narrow rocky path to a scenic ridge overlook revealing a vast valley with a river and distant mountains under dramatic partly cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain trail along cliff face

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the narrow mountain trail with a large rock wall on the right

entered.detail: large gray rock formation forming a wall along the right side of the trail
narrow dirt and gravel path winding up the mountainside
grass-covered hillside rising to the left of the path
solitary tall pine tree visible at the top of the ascent

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow mountain trail hugging a large rock wall on the right. The path is composed of dirt and scattered stones, with grassy slopes rising on the left. A tall pine tree stands visible in the distance against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending mountain path through grassy terrain

events.description: view opens up to reveal distant valley and mountains as the path crests the ridge

agents.ego_description: continuing the ascent as the trail gradually opens up to scenic views

entered.detail: large boulders and rocky formations on the left side of the trail
expansive valley view becoming visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character ascends through grassy terrain as the rock wall recedes to the right. Pine trees line the left side of the path. Around the 35-second mark, the view opens dramatically to reveal a distant valley and mountain range ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge overlook with panoramic valley view

agents.ego_description: walking along the ridge edge while admiring the expansive valley view

entered.detail: wide river visible in the valley below reflecting the cloudy sky
distant mountain peaks forming the horizon line
dense forest covering the valley floor and lower slopes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open mountain ridge with a panoramic view of the valley below. A wide river winds through the distant forested landscape, with mountain ranges visible on the horizon. The path follows the cliff edge with dramatic clouds overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a confined mountain trail into a vast, panoramic ridge overlook. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path hugged by a towering rock wall on the right and grassy slopes on the left. As the character climbs, the rock wall recedes and the terrain opens into a grassy ascent lined with pine trees. The view then expands dramatically to reveal a distant valley and mountain range, shifting the perspective from a closed trail to an open landscape. Finally, the camera follows the character along the cliff edge of a high ridge, overlooking a wide river winding through a forested valley under a dramatic, cloudy sky.
